emails.subject: Welcome message for new team member
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

We have a new team member starting next week! Could you create a simple welcome message file in /home/alice/team-messages/? Just put "Hello" as the message content - we'll customize it later with their name.

The file should be called greeting.txt (so the full path is /home/alice/team-messages/greeting.txt).

Let me know on Slack once it's ready!

Thanks,
Bob
